title: Garnet [16x]
body:
💜 Garnet Resource Pack: Vibrant & Optimized
Garnet is a high-performance 16x resource pack designed to polish the Vanilla experience without slowing down your PC. By introducing deep purple tones and refined gradients, it creates a sleek, professional look perfect for competitive play. ⚔️

💎 Key Enhancements
🎨 Purple Aesthetics: Replaces standard tones with vibrant purple shades and darker gradients for a unique, personalized atmosphere.

🚀 PvP Optimized: Engineered for maximum FPS and smooth performance. It’s a top choice for players who need every frame to count in battle.

✨ Subtle Refinement: Maintains the "Vanilla feel" while cleaning up textures for a sharper, less cluttered look.

🎯 Competitive Edge: Includes native anti-aliasing effects and clearer visuals to help with reaction timing and spotting enemies.
